$metadata.author: Usman Hussain
$metadata.scope: Deferred decision and blocker register for 6A-6C Runtime Integration FFETs.

blockers.description: Deferred semantic contract/package identifier rename for the 11 contract manifests from Stage 0 Wave 3.
blockers.required_resolution: Create and execute a Stage 2 versioned contract-change pack before or alongside runtime wiring consumers.

blockers.description: NestJS 11 prerequisite is currently satisfied in apps/api/package.json with @nestjs/common, @nestjs/core, and @nestjs/platform-express at ^11.1.26.
blockers.required_resolution: Re-verify package metadata and native validation before Stage 2 runtime wiring begins.

blockers.description: Runtime integration package was generated before Stage 1 amendment FFET execution and must be regenerated or re-audited against the post-Stage-1 artifact set.
blockers.required_resolution: After Stage 1 closure, rebaseline the RI package and run a fresh independent Gate-2 audit before any RI Gate 3 request.

guards: schema changes require separate control pack
frontend work requires screen contract first
contract/API semantic identifier changes require versioned contract FFET
